findings.location: s1 — property table, 必須 column
findings.description: The knowledge file adds a '必須' (required) column with ○ marks for layoutFile and dataFile. The source file has no required/optional column and does not indicate that these properties are required. Only bufferSize is annotated as optional ('任意指定') in the source; no corresponding 'required' designation exists for the other properties.
findings.source_evidence: Source table has columns: 設定項目, プロパティ名, データ型, 備考 — no 必須 column. bufferSize is annotated '(任意指定: デフォルト=8192B)' but layoutFile and dataFile have no such annotation either way.
